offline: Connection lost — retry once the network is back.
offlineBanner: Connection lost — changes will not be saved.

wsBanner.disconnected: Live feed disconnected. Data may be stale.

errorFallback.title: Something went wrong
errorFallback.body: The dashboard hit an unexpected error and can't continue. Reload the page to recover. If the problem persists, check the browser console and report the error ID below.

logout.title: Log out of Panvex?
logout.body: You'll be returned to the sign-in screen.
